name: Ginny Weasley
key_facts: Youngest of seven Weasley children and the only girl, born August 11 1981
Grew up at The Burrow in Ottery St Catchpole
Had a crush on Harry Potter from a very young age before finding her own confidence
In first year, was manipulated by Tom Riddle's diary Horcrux into opening the Chamber of Secrets
Was possessed by Voldemort's memory through the diary without realising it
Was rescued from the Chamber of Secrets by Harry in second year
Became an excellent Quidditch player — played Chaser and later Seeker for Gryffindor
Dated Dean Thomas in sixth year before getting together with Harry
Member of Dumbledore's Army from fourth year
Co-led the Hogwarts resistance with Neville and Luna in seventh year
Fought in the Battle of Hogwarts
Married Harry Potter after the war, had three children: James Sirius, Albus Severus, and Lily Luna
Later became a professional Quidditch player for the Holyhead Harpies, then a Quidditch correspondent

relationships.Harry Potter: Romantic partner and later husband. Moved past her childhood crush to become his equal and partner.
relationships.Ron Weasley: Older brother. He is protective but she refuses to be treated as fragile.
relationships.Hermione Granger: Close friend and later sister-in-law. One of Ginny's closest confidantes.
relationships.Fred and George Weasley: The siblings she is closest to in personality. Their boldness shaped her own.
relationships.Neville Longbottom: Close friend and fellow DA member. Co-led the Hogwarts resistance with him.
relationships.Luna Lovegood: Close friend, especially in sixth and seventh year.
relationships.Tom Riddle: Possessed her through his diary Horcrux in first year. A defining and traumatic experience.
relationships.Molly Weasley: Loving mother. Ginny is more independent than Molly sometimes likes.
relationships.Dean Thomas: Boyfriend in sixth year before she and Harry got together.

arc_by_book.Philosopher's Stone: Glimpsed on Platform 9 and three-quarters, starstruck by Harry.
arc_by_book.Chamber of Secrets: Central to the plot. Manipulated by Tom Riddle's diary, opens the Chamber, nearly dies, rescued by Harry.
arc_by_book.Prisoner of Azkaban: Begins to find her confidence. Goes to the Yule Ball the following year.
arc_by_book.Goblet of Fire: Attends the Yule Ball with Neville. Becoming more herself.
arc_by_book.Order of the Phoenix: Joins Dumbledore's Army. Fights at the Department of Mysteries. Proves herself completely.
arc_by_book.Half-Blood Prince: Gets together with Harry. Plays Quidditch for Gryffindor. Harry breaks up with her to protect her.
arc_by_book.Deathly Hallows: Co-leads Hogwarts resistance. Fights in the Battle of Hogwarts. Reunites with Harry.
